content.en:
"Come in!"

Ye Tian entered this treasure land, separated from the Lord of Ice and Rain, and then began to go deeper into this treasure land.

As soon as he explored, he encountered a reincarnation blood-eating worm.

The Reincarnation Blood Eater is not big, only a hundred meters tall, which is already a very small creature.

But this reincarnation blood-devouring insect has a majestic aura, which is already comparable to the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm, and it is not an ordinary Origin Upper Realm, at least comparable to the powerful Origin Upper Realm.

"It's really dangerous here, the reincarnation blood-devouring insect is comparable to the powerful Origin Upper Realm, I'm afraid there will be even more terrifying creatures!"

Ye Tian estimated that if he was greedy in the Origin Upper Realm this time, he was afraid that he would have to die a lot.

Holding the Medium Origin Treasure Spear, he performed the Beyond Slashing Technique and stabbed it with one shot.

Burst!

The Reincarnation Blood Eater was severely injured by Ye Tian's first shot, and killed it with the second shot.

Just after killing the Reincarnation Blood Eater, he found a blood-red crystal from the Reincarnation Blood Eater, which contained very majestic energy, which should be a good thing.

He put it away.

Now.

He was thinking about another thing, that is, to get rid of the surveillance of the Desolate Blood Ancestor and search for treasure resources in this Void Treasure Land by himself.

If he was under surveillance, he wouldn't be able to replicate his body, otherwise he would definitely be discovered.

"Destroying the Desolate Ancient Bead in the body, the Desolate Blood Ancestor will definitely know that it will offend an Origin Upper Realm Overlord. "

This is not an option.

Ye Tian thought carefully about the way, and after a long time, he thought of a seemingly feasible solution.

He can first fight some reincarnation blood-eating insects, then pretend to be injured and find a place to heal.

After that, he can gather one avatar after another to go to the neighborhood to find information.

Although the avatar can't go too far and has no combat power, his purpose is to hide the truth about his own condensed and copied body.

As long as he condensed the incarnation again and again, and then suddenly condensed a replica body, even if the Desolate Blood Ancestor peeped, he would only think that it was an incarnation, and he would not think too much.

In this way, his replica body would disguise itself as an avatar and leave, thus freeing himself from the surveillance of the Desolate Blood Ancestor.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian decided.

Soon.

He was discovered by a number of reincarnation bloodeaters, and then besieged, he deliberately hid part of his strength, and finally killed these reincarnation bloodeaters at the cost of serious injuries.

Followed by.

He just began to look for a suitable place to heal.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian began to copy his body, and he also began to condense one by one to explore information nearby.

Nothing can be seen until the copy body is condensed, and it will only appear after the replication is successful.

After a while.

Ye Tian's copy body was successfully condensed, and he immediately condensed several avatars, and the copy body left here after mixing with the avatars.

......

Outside the treasure land.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor investigated the situation of each Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor through the Desolate Ancient Mother Bead, and also saw the picture of Ye Tian condensing an incarnation.

It was a little useless, but he didn't care.

"Three Origin Ascenders have died!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor muttered.

Anyway, it wasn't the Origin Ascendant Realm of the Ancient Heavenly Palace that died, and he didn't regret it.

The other side.

After Ye Tian got rid of the prying eyes of the Ancient Bead, he found a slightly safer place and began to copy his body again.

He didn't want this replica body to fall, so he would have to replicate it again, which would be a bit risky.

So.

He is going to make another copy of the body, and with two copy bodies that are free from surveillance, he is not afraid that one of the copy bodies will fall, and it is a big deal to copy one more.

Such.

After Ye Tian for a while, he copied another replica body, and then let this replica body look for treasures.

Soon.

Ye Tian found something good.

"This is the Reincarnation Heavenly Blood Fruit, which can greatly enhance the will of the Origin Realm!"

With such a reincarnation heavenly blood fruit, he found more than twenty!

"It's a good thing, and it all belongs to me, so I don't have to share it with the Desolate Blood Ancestor!"

Ye Tian put away these Reincarnation Heavenly Blood Fruits and then sent them to another replica body.

This replica body didn't need to move, and it ate a reincarnation heavenly blood fruit.

Rumble!!!!!

The energy of the Reincarnation Heavenly Blood Fruit continued to pour into his body, refining his Origin Realm will and allowing the Origin Realm will to quickly improve.

"It's working out great!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Another replica continues to search for treasure resources.

After a while, he found something good again.

"Nine Immortal Vines, the treasure that can copy and comprehend the Origin Rules of the Other Shore, although it is of little use to me, but for the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Rules of the Eighty Percent and Nine Shores, this thing is a good thing, it can help them raise the Origin Rules of the Other Shore to the Ninety Percent Realm!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the years that followed, he searched and found treasure after treasure.

Each treasure was enough to make the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor crazy, and a few of them were of great help to the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

And.

He also knew now what the crystal nucleus in the body of the reincarnation blood eater was, after refining this crystal nucleus, it would help to improve the origin of the other side, and the effect was quite good.

If there are enough reincarnation blood-devouring insect crystal nuclei, the origin of the other side can definitely rise sharply.

this day.

Ye Tian had killed too many reincarnation blood-devouring insect crystal nuclei, but he was unlucky enough to encounter a reincarnation blood-devouring insect with top-notch Origin Upper Realm combat power.

Rumble!!!

The strength of this reincarnation blood devouring insect is no less than Ye Tian, Ye Tian has been fighting with it for a long time, but he can't tell the winner.

After fighting for a period of time, it attracted more and more reincarnation blood-eating insects, as well as two reincarnation blood-eating insects that were comparable to the top Origin Upper Realm.

That's it.

Ye Tian was caught in a bitter battle and encirclement.

Gradually, Ye Tian began to get injured a lot, and he couldn't break through the encirclement.

Eventually, the replica body fell and died.

After the fall of this replica body, Ye Tian began to continue to copy the body and continue to search for treasures, but this time he was more careful.

Gradually, a period of time passed.

At this time.

The Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors who were still alive were all excited, because they had found a lot of good things.

However, they are reluctant to leave, let alone stay here.

There are so many good things found in the outermost areas, if you continue to dig deeper, wouldn't you be able to get more good things?

If you ask them to give up, they really can't do it!

At this time.

Ye Tianyi began to go deep into the depths of this treasure land.

Seeing a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor go deep into the treasure land, the Desolate Blood Ancestor smiled.

"Sure enough, these Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors are still deep!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor muttered.
